---
title: Extending the open-source R package {spatsoc} to measure intragroup
  social dynamics
format: typst
---

Alec L. Robitaille (corresponding author, ORCID: 0000-0002-4706-1762, Department
of Biology, Memorial University of Newfoundland and Labrador)

Quinn M. R. Webber (ORCID: 0000-0002-0434-9360, Department of Integrative
Biology, University of Guelph)

Eric Vander Wal (ORCID: 0000-0002-8534-4317, Department of Biology, Memorial
University of Newfoundland and Labrador)
